name: Tenyi Spirit - Shthana
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>天</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>威</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>い</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>龍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－シュターナ
desc: If you control no Effect Monsters: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If a face-up non-Effect Monster(s) you control is destroyed by battle or card effect: You can banish this card from your hand or GY, then target 1 of those destroyed monsters; Special Summon it, then you can destroy 1 monster your opponent controls. You can only use each effect of "Tenyi Spirit - Shthana" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If you control no Effect Monsters: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If a face-up non-Effect Monster(s) you control is destroyed by battle or card effect: You can banish this card from your hand or GY, then target 1 of those destroyed monsters; Special Summon it, then you can destroy 1 monster your opponent controls. You can only use each effect of "Tenyi Spirit - Shthana" once per turn.
eff: If you control no Effect Monsters: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If a face-up non-Effect Monster(s) you control is destroyed by battle or card effect: You can banish this card from your hand or GY, then target 1 of those destroyed monsters; Special Summon it, then you can destroy 1 monster your opponent controls. You can only use each effect of "Tenyi Spirit - Shthana" once per turn.

sets.set: Ghosts From the Past: The 2nd Haunting

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summons from your opponent's Graveyard to your field
Special Summons the opponent's banished monsters to the player's field
banished: Banishes itself from hand for cost
Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
